skills.name: Enmascarado
skills.description: Change to Lucha Libre stance by wearing a mask to fight freely. Damage of your Luchador skill increases but is stunned by 5% when hit by the Luchador skill cast by the enemy.

skills.name: Chop
skills.description: Wave your hand toward the enemy and hit it hard. Final Damage of Chop increases by 15% every time 1 Overheat of the skill is used and 1 combination buff stack is applied.

skills.name: Golpear
skills.description: Continuous punches to the front, damaging enemies in that range.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2 per 0.3 seconds
Targets: CaptionRatio
Duration: 3 seconds

skills.name: Lucha De Silla
skills.description: Lift objects with both hands and hit the enemy hard. The target is stunned for a while.

skills.name: Chocar
skills.description: Give damage to the enemy by rushing toward the front in a surprise attack. The target is knocked down.

skills.name: Ceremonia
skills.description: Apply a debuff on the enemy by a pose that disturbs the surrounding enemy. Male character applies [Provoke] and female character applies [Seduce] on the enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Max. Number of Target CaptionRatio
Duration 5 seconds
[Provoke]
- Approach the caster with speed and attack by force
- Final Accuracy -50%
[Seduce]
- Follows the caster with a decreased Movement Speed
Max. level 1

skills.name: Martinete
skills.description: Jump high and hit the floor, damaging the surrounding enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 12
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR
[Stun] duration 3 seconds or
[Groggy] Duration 10 seconds
(Immune for [Duration*3] seconds after [Groggy] is over)

attributes.name: Enmascarado: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases Luchador skill damage effect of [Enmascarado] +0.5%

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Enmascarado: Buceando
attributes.description:
* When using Chocar or knock down enemy during Enmascarado buff, [Special Skill: Buceando] can be used (Use by C-key sub attack button)

* Buceando : Jump towards the enemy and attack with your elbow. 1 [Combination] buff stack is applied to the caster (skill factor : 87.5% of skill factor per 1 Chocar hit. Additional AoE Attack Ratio : 8)

* Enmascarado buff is removed when activating or deactivating the attribute

attributes.name: Enmascarado: Buceando
attributes.description:
* When using Chocar or knock down enemy during Enmascarado buff, [Special Skill: Buceando] can be used (Use by C-key sub attack button)

* Buceando : Jump towards the enemy and attack with your elbow. 1 [Combination] buff stack is applied to the caster (skill factor : 87.5% of skill factor per 1 Chocar hit. Additional AoE Attack Ratio : 8)

* Enmascarado buff is removed when activating or deactivating the attribute

attributes.name: Enmascarado: Rodando
attributes.description:
* When using Lucha De Silla or stun enemy during Enmascarado buff, [Special Skill: Rodando] can be used (Use by C-key sub attack button)

* Rodando : Roll forward and collide with the enemy to cause damage. 1 [Combination] buff stack is applied to the caster (skill factor : 46.6% of skill factor per 1 Lucha De Silla hit. Knockdown enemy by 5% chance)

* Enmascarado buff is removed when activating or deactivating the attribute

attributes.name: Enmascarado: Rodando
attributes.description:
* When using Lucha De Silla or stun enemy during Enmascarado buff, [Special Skill: Rodando] can be used (Use by C-key sub attack button)

* Rodando : Roll forward and collide with the enemy to cause damage. 1 [Combination] buff stack is applied to the caster (skill factor : 46.6% of skill factor per 1 Lucha De Silla hit. Knockdown enemy by 5% chance)

* Enmascarado buff is removed when activating or deactivating the attribute

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Lucha De Silla: Super Stun
attributes.description:
* Lucha De Silla's stun effect is applied by 50% chance but enemy with stun immune can also be stunned (Does not apply to monsters)

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Chocar: Super Knockdown
attributes.description:
* Chocar's knockdown effect is applied by 50% chance but enemy with knockdown immune can also be knocked down (Does not apply to monsters)

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: [Arts] Golpear: Huracan
attributes.description:
* Golpear changes to attracting and damaging the surrounding enemy as it spins instead (Does not attract stationary and boss monsters)

* Number of target changes to 10. Maximum channeling duration and attack cycle does not change

attributes.name: [Arts] Ceremonia: Victoria
attributes.description: * Ceremonia changes to becoming invincible for 3 seconds instead

attributes.name: [Arts] Chop: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Chop] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Golpear: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Golpear] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Lucha De Silla: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Lucha De Silla] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Chocar: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Chocar] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Martinete: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Martinete] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Enmascarado: Speed Run
attributes.description:
* Basic Running Movement Speed of Enmascarado buff changes to Dash Movement Speed and consumes stamina

* Stamina consumed by basic running and dash decreases by 50% compared to when the attribute is not activated

* Dash can be used but Movement Speed and stamina consumed is equal to basic running
